_meta.description: Half-antigen (small molecule < 500 Da) Virtual Affinity Maturation. VH/VL and VHH. See docs/HAPTEN_VAM_STANDARD_V1.0.md.

structure.purpose: ABodyBuilder2 structure prediction, CMC, ANARCI numbering, report generation

docking.purpose: AutoDock Vina docking, Meeko receptor/ligand preparation

abodybuilder2.function: Dual-chain Fv structure prediction (VH+VL), IMGT numbering

known_limitations: Use single-line shell script via WSL for robust execution
|ddG| > 5 kcal/mol: possible structural artifact from IMGT-numbered PDB
Returns same ddG for all 19 AA at contact_count=0 positions
Returns None for IMGT-numbered PDB (residue indices out of training distribution)
If None fraction > 50%, stability veto is silently bypassed — must log explicitly

cmc_biopython.function: pI, Instability Index (II), GRAVY via ProteinAnalysis

openmm_mmgbsa.function: Physics-based ddG refinement for top candidates (GAFF2 + OBC2)
known_limitations: Requires GAFF2 ligand parameters from AmberTools (WSL) as prerequisite
ddG results for charged mutations (e.g. N116E) unreliable due to rapid EvoEF2 BuildMutant distortions
Each batch MUST include WT control; cross-batch absolute values incomparable
Positive dG_bind (>0) is expected for implicit solvent without full equilibration

numbering.structure_output: ABodyBuilder2 uses IMGT numbering in PDB output
numbering.forbidden: Do NOT hardcode linear positions. Always derive from PDB parsing.

cmc_detection_antibody._note: Relaxed thresholds for in-vitro detection antibodies (not injected into patients)

mmgbsa.cross_batch_comparison: FORBIDDEN — include WT in every batch

report_requirements.fasta_verification: Every FASTA sequence must pass check_mutant_diff before writing
report_requirements.dual_numbering_table: HTML and PDF reports must include IMGT-to-linear CDR3 mapping table
report_requirements.thermompnn_note: If ThermoMPNN None fraction > 50%, report must state: 'Stability veto bypassed — II < 45 used as proxy'
report_requirements.mmgbsa_note: If MM/GBSA shows |dG_bind| > 500 kcal/mol for charged mutations, report must note structural distortion limitation
report_requirements.audit_log: _hallucination_audit.json must be included in project deliverables

must_do: Run build_imgt_to_linear_map() from PDB — never hardcode linear positions
Call HallucinationGuard.write_audit() at end of every pipeline step
Include CDR3 dual-numbering table in every client report
State explicitly if ThermoMPNN stability veto was bypassed
must_not_do: Use IMGT residue numbers as direct sequence indices
Compute linear_pos = imgt_resnum - constant (any hardcoded offset)
Skip HallucinationGuard on the grounds that 'results look correct'
Use PRODIGY for hapten antigens (no protein-protein interface)
Cross-compare MM/GBSA absolute values across different batches
Deliver FASTA sequences without sequence back-check verification
